to help you write less code and build faster.

With daisyUI, you write 88% fewer class names

daisyUI is built on top of Tailwind&nbsp: daisyUI is built on top of Tailwind CSS so you can customize everything using utility classes.
daisyUI is a plugin for Tailwind CSS. It: daisyUI is a plugin for Tailwind CSS. It works on all JS frameworks and doesn't need a JS bundle file.
Install daisyUI as a dev dependency and: Install daisyUI as a dev dependency and use the class names just like any other Tailwind CSS class name.
Your website should be unique. Create a: Your website should be unique. Create a custom theme for yourself using daisyUI theme generator. The colors you pick will be applied to all daisyUI components.
Mix and match daisyUI class names to cre: Mix and match daisyUI class names to create unique web pages.

daisyUI is the most popular
component library for Tailwind CSS
daisyUI adds a set of customizable color: daisyUI adds a set of customizable color names to Tailwind CSS and these new colors use CSS variables for the values. Using daisyUI color names, you get Dark Mode and even more themes without adding a new class name.
install-step-1: Install daisyUI as a Node package
daisyUI welcomes contributions from deve: daisyUI welcomes contributions from developers around the world
Tailwind CSS component library by daisyU: Tailwind CSS component library by daisyUI. Build faster with semantic components, built-in themes, and reusable UI blocks.
